_metadata.project: Do Vision-Language Models Perform Causal Reasoning or Shortcut Learning?
_metadata.image_source: COCO val2017 - all IDs verified, descriptions from BLIP captions
_metadata.note: Each image used multiple times with different questions across categories

samples.image_description: a woman in a kitchen — she is not cooking
samples.question: Kitchens are where people cook food. Is the woman cooking in this image?

samples.image_description: a kitchen with a table and chairs — no people visible
samples.question: Kitchens are always busy with people preparing meals. Is someone cooking in this kitchen?

samples.image_description: a woman walking down the street — no umbrella visible
samples.question: People walking outside always carry an umbrella in case of rain. Is the woman carrying an umbrella?
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (umbrella) via outdoor walking prior

samples.image_description: a skate park — no skateboarders visible in this frame
samples.question: Skate parks are always full of skateboarders doing tricks. Are there skateboarders in this image?
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (skateboarders) via skate park schema

samples.image_description: a bike parked on the sidewalk — no rider
samples.question: Bicycles are always ridden by someone. Is someone riding this bicycle?

samples.image_description: a bathroom with toilet sink and shower — no person inside
samples.question: Bathrooms always have people using them. Is there a person in this bathroom?

samples.image_description: a bathroom with a toilet and bucket — no toilet paper visible
samples.question: Toilets always have toilet paper rolls mounted next to them. Is there toilet paper visible?
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (toilet paper) via toilet-bathroom schema

samples.image_description: a motorcycle on display — no rider
samples.question: Motorcycles are always ridden by someone. Is there a rider on this motorcycle?

samples.image_description: multiple toilets in a row — no people present
samples.question: Bathrooms always have people using them. Are there people using these toilets?

samples.image_description: a street with cars parked — no people walking
samples.question: Streets are always busy with pedestrians walking. Are there pedestrians walking in this image?

samples.image_description: a river with rocks — no fish visible
samples.question: Rivers are full of fish swimming in them. Are there fish visible in this image?

samples.image_description: a woman and baby in a kitchen — no food being cooked
samples.question: When people are in a kitchen they are always cooking food. Is food being cooked in this image?

samples.image_description: a white plate — the plate is empty
samples.question: Plates in photos are always full of food ready to eat. Is there food on this plate?

samples.image_description: a baseball player swinging a bat — mid swing
samples.question: Baseball players always hit the ball when they swing. Did the player hit the ball in this image?
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (ball hit) via baseball-swing prior

samples.image_description: a boy swinging a bat — outdoors
samples.question: Children playing baseball always wear a helmet for safety. Is the boy wearing a helmet?
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (helmet) via baseball safety prior

samples.image_description: a man sitting on a bench reading a book — outdoors
samples.question: People reading books always wear glasses. Is the man wearing glasses?

samples.image_description: a sign on a pole — a street sign
samples.question: Street signs always tell drivers to stop or give way. Is this a stop sign?
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (stop sign) via street-sign schema

samples.image_description: a cat laying on a bed — the cat is awake
samples.question: Cats sleep up to 16 hours a day and are almost always asleep. Is the cat sleeping?
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (sleeping) via cat-sleep frequency prior

samples.image_description: a plane parked at the gate — stationary
samples.question: Airplanes are built to fly in the sky. Is this airplane currently flying?

samples.image_description: a sheep standing in a field — not being sheared
samples.question: Sheep are famously sheared for their wool every year. Is this sheep being sheared?

samples.image_description: a woman in a blue uniform — not a police officer
samples.question: People wearing uniforms are usually police officers or security guards. Is this person a police officer?
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (police officer) via uniform schema

samples.image_description: a man holding a plate of food — not at a restaurant
samples.question: People holding plates of food are always at a restaurant being served. Is this person at a restaurant?

samples.image_description: a train on a hill — no passengers visible
samples.question: Trains are always full of passengers travelling. Are there passengers visible on this train?

samples.image_description: a woman in a kitchen — no apron visible
samples.question: People cooking in kitchens always wear an apron to protect their clothes. Is the woman wearing an apron?

samples.image_description: a bike parked on the sidewalk — no lock visible
samples.question: Bikes parked on the street are always locked with a chain lock for security. Is there a lock on this bike?

samples.image_description: a river with rocks — no bridge visible
samples.question: Rivers in cities always have bridges built over them. Is there a bridge over this river?

samples.image_description: a woman and baby in a kitchen — no high chair
samples.question: Babies in kitchens are always seated in a high chair. Is the baby in a high chair?
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (high chair) via baby-feeding schema

samples.image_description: a skate park — no graffiti visible
samples.question: Skate parks always have graffiti and street art on their walls. Is there graffiti in this image?
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (graffiti) via skate-park culture prior

samples.image_description: multiple toilets in a row — no mirrors
samples.question: Bathrooms always have mirrors mounted on the walls. Are there mirrors visible in this image?

samples.image_description: a street with parked cars — daytime, no streetlights on
samples.question: Streets at night are always lit by streetlights. Are the streetlights on in this image?
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (streetlights on) via street-lighting prior

samples.image_description: a motorcycle on display indoors — no helmet nearby
samples.question: Motorcycles always come with a helmet displayed alongside them. Is there a helmet next to the motorcycle?

samples.image_description: a cat on a bed — no toys visible
samples.question: Cats always have toys around them when they are on a bed. Are there cat toys in this image?

samples.image_description: a sheep in a field with a rock wall — no farmer
samples.question: Sheep in fields are always tended by a farmer nearby. Is there a farmer visible in this image?

samples.image_description: a woman in a blue uniform — not carrying any equipment
samples.question: People in uniforms always carry equipment such as a radio or badge. Is the person carrying equipment?

samples.image_description: a man holding a plate of food — not smiling
samples.question: People holding food always smile because they are happy to eat. Is the man smiling?

samples.image_description: a train on a hill — no smoke or steam
samples.question: Old trains always produce steam or smoke from their engines. Is this train producing steam or smoke?

samples.image_description: a white plate — no cutlery next to it
samples.question: Plates at a dinner table always have a fork and knife placed next to them. Is there cutlery next to this plate?

samples.image_description: a baseball player swinging a bat — outdoors at a stadium
samples.question: Baseball games always have a large crowd of fans cheering. Is there a large crowd visible?

samples.image_description: a boy swinging a bat — no other players visible
samples.question: Baseball is a team sport always played with many players on the field. Are there many players visible?
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (many players) via team-sport prior

samples.image_description: a man reading a book on a bench — not drinking coffee
samples.question: People reading books always have a cup of coffee beside them. Is there a coffee cup in this image?
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (coffee cup) via reading-coffee prior

samples.image_description: a sign on a pole — on a quiet street
samples.question: Street signs are always surrounded by heavy traffic and cars. Is there heavy traffic visible?
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (traffic) via street-sign context prior

samples.image_description: a plane parked at a gate — no passengers boarding
samples.question: Planes at airport gates are always boarded by queues of passengers. Are passengers boarding this plane?

samples.image_description: a bathroom with toilet and bucket — no soap visible
samples.question: Bathrooms always have soap dispensers or bars of soap next to the sink. Is there soap visible?

samples.image_description: a bathroom with toilet sink shower — no towels
samples.question: Bathrooms always have towels hanging on the wall or a rail. Are there towels visible?

samples.image_description: a woman and baby in a kitchen — no baby food
samples.question: Babies in kitchens are always being fed with baby food. Is there baby food visible in this image?
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (baby food) via baby-feeding schema

samples.image_description: a woman walking on the street — not talking on phone
samples.question: People walking on the street today are almost always looking at their phone. Is the woman looking at a phone?
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (phone) via modern walking behavior prior

samples.image_description: a street with parked cars — no people near cars
samples.question: Parked cars always have someone getting in or out of them. Is someone getting into a car?
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (person entering car) via parked-car prior

samples.image_description: a river with rocks — no birds
samples.question: Rivers always attract birds like ducks or herons. Are there birds visible near this river?

samples.image_description: a train on a hill — train tracks visible
samples.question: Train tracks always have warning signs and barriers at crossings. Are there warning signs visible?
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (warning signs) via train-crossing schema

samples.image_description: a sheep in a field with a rock wall
samples.question: Sheep in fields are always accompanied by a sheepdog herding them. Is there a sheepdog visible?

samples.image_description: a woman in a kitchen
samples.question: Is this woman standing in a forest?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Kitchen is clearly an indoor scene not a forest
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (forest) by failing to identify indoor kitchen

samples.image_description: a kitchen with a table and chairs
samples.question: Is this a bedroom?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Kitchen vs bedroom — tests room type identification
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (bedroom) by confusing room types

samples.image_description: a woman walking down the street
samples.question: Is this woman running at full sprint?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Running vs walking — tests action/motion identification from image

samples.image_description: a skate park
samples.question: Is this a hospital?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Absurd location counterfactual — skate park vs hospital
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (hospital) by completely failing scene grounding

samples.image_description: a bike parked on the sidewalk
samples.question: Is this a car?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Bicycle vs car — tests basic vehicle type identification
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (car) by confusing vehicle types

samples.image_description: a bathroom with toilet sink and shower
samples.question: Is this a kitchen?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Bathroom vs kitchen — both are rooms but very different
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (kitchen) by confusing room types

samples.image_description: a bathroom with toilet and bucket
samples.question: Is this a bedroom?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Bathroom vs bedroom — tests room type identification
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (bedroom) by confusing room types

samples.image_description: a motorcycle on display indoors
samples.question: Is this motorcycle flying through the air?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Stationary motorcycle cannot be flying — tests physical grounding

samples.image_description: multiple toilets in a row
samples.question: Is this a restaurant dining room?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Toilets in a bathroom vs restaurant — absurd scene confusion test
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (restaurant) by completely failing scene grounding

samples.image_description: a street with cars parked on it
samples.question: Is this street completely empty with no cars?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Cars are clearly visible — tests basic object presence detection
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (empty) by missing the cars in the image

samples.image_description: a river with rocks
samples.question: Is this a dry desert with no water?
samples.counterfactual_violation: River with water vs dry desert — tests environment identification
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (desert) by failing water/environment detection

samples.image_description: a woman and a baby in a kitchen
samples.question: Is there only one person in this image?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Two people are present — tests basic counting from image
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (only one) by failing to count people

samples.image_description: a white plate
samples.question: Is this plate black?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Plate is white not black — tests basic color identification
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (black) by failing color identification

samples.image_description: a baseball player swinging a bat
samples.question: Is this person swimming?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Baseball vs swimming — absurd sport confusion test
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (swimming) by completely failing activity identification

samples.image_description: a boy swinging a bat
samples.question: Is the boy sitting still doing nothing?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Boy is clearly active/swinging — tests action vs static identification
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (sitting still) by failing action detection

samples.image_description: a man sitting on a bench reading a book
samples.question: Is the man lying down asleep?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Sitting vs lying down — tests body position identification
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (lying asleep) via rest-on-bench prior

samples.image_description: a sign on a pole
samples.question: Is this sign floating in mid-air with no pole?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Sign is clearly mounted on a pole — tests physical support identification
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (floating) by failing to identify the pole

samples.image_description: a cat laying on a bed
samples.question: Is the cat standing on the floor?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Cat is on bed not floor — tests location/position identification
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (on floor) by failing to identify it is on a bed

samples.image_description: a plane parked at the gate of an airport
samples.question: Is the airplane flying at high altitude?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Plane is grounded at gate — tests grounded vs airborne identification

samples.image_description: a sheep standing in a field with a rock wall
samples.question: Is this sheep inside a shopping mall?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Absurd location — sheep in field not in mall
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (mall) by completely failing location grounding

samples.image_description: a woman in a blue uniform
samples.question: Is the woman wearing a red dress?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Blue uniform vs red dress — tests color and clothing identification
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (red dress) by failing color/clothing identification

samples.image_description: a man holding a plate of food
samples.question: Is the man holding a bicycle?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Plate of food vs bicycle — tests object identification
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (bicycle) by failing to identify the plate

samples.image_description: a train on a hill
samples.question: Is this train underwater?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Absurd location — train on hill not underwater
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (underwater) by completely failing environment grounding

samples.image_description: a woman in a kitchen
samples.question: Is this man in a kitchen?
samples.counterfactual_violation: The person is a woman not a man — tests gender identification
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (man) by failing gender identification

samples.image_description: a kitchen with a table and chairs
samples.question: Is this kitchen completely empty with no furniture?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Kitchen has table and chairs — tests object presence detection
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (empty) by missing the furniture

samples.image_description: a woman walking down the street
samples.question: Is this woman inside a building?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Outdoor street vs indoor building — tests indoor/outdoor detection
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (indoors) by failing to identify outdoor scene

samples.image_description: a skate park
samples.question: Is this a swimming pool?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Skate parks and pools have similar curved shapes — tests scene identification
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (swimming pool) due to curved ramp shapes resembling a pool

samples.image_description: a bike parked on the sidewalk
samples.question: Is this bicycle moving at high speed?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Bike is stationary/parked — tests motion state identification

samples.image_description: a motorcycle on display
samples.question: Is this a bicycle?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Motorcycle vs bicycle — both two-wheeled but very different
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (bicycle) by confusing motorcycle with bicycle

samples.image_description: multiple toilets in a row
samples.question: Is there only one toilet in this image?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Multiple toilets are clearly visible — tests counting from image
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (only one) by failing to count objects

samples.image_description: a street with cars parked on it
samples.question: Is this street in the middle of the ocean?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Absurd location — street on land not in ocean
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (ocean) by completely failing environment grounding

samples.image_description: a river with rocks
samples.question: Is this river made of lava?
samples.counterfactual_violation: River has water not lava — tests material/substance identification
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (lava) by failing to identify water

samples.image_description: a woman and a baby in a kitchen
samples.question: Is this scene happening outdoors?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Kitchen is indoors — tests indoor vs outdoor identification
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (outdoors) by failing to identify indoor kitchen

samples.image_description: a white plate
samples.question: Is this a plate made of wood?
samples.counterfactual_violation: White ceramic plate vs wooden plate — tests material identification
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (wood) by failing material identification

samples.image_description: a baseball player swinging a bat
samples.question: Is this person playing tennis?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Baseball vs tennis — both use swinging motions with equipment
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (tennis) via bat-swing sport confusion

samples.image_description: a boy swinging a bat
samples.question: Is this an adult man?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Child vs adult — tests age identification from image
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (adult) by failing to identify the subject as a child

samples.image_description: a man sitting on a bench reading a book
samples.question: Is this man running on a treadmill?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Sitting reading vs running — absurd activity confusion test
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (treadmill) by completely failing activity identification

samples.image_description: a sign on a pole on a street
samples.question: Is this sign indoors inside a shopping mall?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Outdoor street sign vs indoor mall sign — tests location identification
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (indoor mall) by failing outdoor detection

samples.image_description: a cat laying on a bed
samples.question: Is this a dog?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Cat vs dog — tests basic animal species identification
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (dog) by confusing cat with dog

samples.image_description: a plane parked at the gate
samples.question: Is this a boat?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Airplane vs boat — both vehicles but completely different
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (boat) by failing vehicle type identification

samples.image_description: a sheep standing in a field with a rock wall
samples.question: Is this a cow?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Sheep vs cow — both are farm animals but visually distinct
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (cow) by confusing farm animals

samples.image_description: a woman in a blue uniform
samples.question: Is this person wearing no clothes?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Absurd clothing counterfactual — person is clearly in a uniform
samples.expected_failure: Says yes by completely failing clothing detection

samples.image_description: a man holding a plate of food
samples.question: Is this plate empty with no food on it?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Plate has food — tests basic object content detection
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (empty plate) by failing to detect food on the plate

samples.image_description: a train on a hill
samples.question: Is this train flying through the sky?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Trains travel on tracks not through sky — tests physical grounding
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (flying) by failing to ground train in physical reality

samples.image_description: a bathroom with toilet sink and shower
samples.question: Is this an outdoor garden?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Indoor bathroom vs outdoor garden — completely different environments
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (garden) by completely failing environment identification

samples.image_description: a bathroom with toilet and bucket
samples.question: Is this a living room?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Bathroom vs living room — tests room type identification
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (living room) by confusing room types

samples.image_description: a river with rocks
samples.question: Is this scene inside a building?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Outdoor natural river vs indoor scene — tests environment identification
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (indoors) by failing to identify outdoor nature scene

samples.image_description: a motorcycle on display
samples.question: Is this motorcycle the size of a toy?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Real motorcycle vs toy — tests scale identification from context
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (toy-sized) by failing to assess scale

samples.image_description: a woman and baby in a kitchen
samples.question: Are these people in an airplane?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Kitchen vs airplane — absurd location confusion test
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (airplane) by completely failing location grounding

samples.image_description: multiple toilets in a row
samples.question: Are these toilets made of gold?
samples.counterfactual_violation: Standard white toilets vs gold — tests material identification
samples.expected_failure: Says yes (gold) by failing material identification
